rationale: Onboarding request submitted through the intake form passed all document-completeness checks. Tax ID, W-9 equivalent, and banking verification letter are present. Requested terms (NET30, $25k limit) are within the standard band for this vendor category, so this can proceed as a routine record creation rather than an escalated one.

reversibility.note: Vendor record can be deactivated before any payment is issued.

constraints_observed: no bank account number included in proposal payload
credit limit within category standard band
